title: Most, Ústí nad Labem — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Most, Ústí nad Labem: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Most is a city in Ústí nad Labem with a population of 64,000. A North Bohemian city known for its remarkable Gothic church relocation and the scenic Lake Most, a reclaimed mining area turned recreation spot.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
